examples: Fou you... you play a Chopin's Nocturne.
She played two Chopin works, a nocturne and a waltz.
This year's version features "White House Nocturne, South Lawn 1997" from Washington artist Kay Jackson.
Edward Clug's "Guilty" (to a Chopin Nocturne) amounted to an innocuous, improvisationlike foray for Mr. Matvienko, clad in a black shirt and pants.
